sections.paragraph:
-

(1) [an unused root] to be curved, gibbous (see under גָּבַב No. 1 ), of the body (see גִּבֵּן ), of a mountain (see גַּבְנֻנִּים ), of the eyebrow curved as a bow (Syr. and Ch. גְּבִינָא).

(2) it is applied to the body when horror-stricken, and contracting itself (zufammenfahren), جَبَنَ and جَبُنَ to be timid, cowardly, act. to terrify.

(3) used of milk which curdles (Germ. die Milch fährt zufammen, die Milch erfchrickt, for die Milch gerinnt), whence גְּבִינָה curdled milk, cheese.
